name: Egg Custard Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
2. Bake the pastry shell for 5 minutes, then let it cool.
3. In a large bowl, whisk together eggs, sugar, vanilla, salt, and 1/4 teaspoon nutmeg until well combined.
4. Gradually stir in milk, mixing well.
5. Pour the filling into the prepared pastry shell and sprinkle with additional ground nutmeg.
6. Bake at 400°F (200°C) for 15 minutes. Reduce heat to 325°F (160°C) and bake an additional 35 minutes or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Allow the pie to cool to room temperature before serving. Store leftover pie in the refrigerator.
